sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: System overview with stat cards, activity charts, and event log in terminal style

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Searchable project list with status badges and date stamps

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: File browser sidebar with code editor area featuring line numbers

sections.name: Kanban
sections.description: Three-column drag-and-drop board (Backlog, In Progress, Done)

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: Canvas-based drawing tool with color picker and tool selection

sections.name: Schema
sections.description: Database schema planner with positioned tables and FK relationship lines

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Collapsible file tree with expand/collapse all controls

sections.name: Ideas
sections.description: Filterable idea card grid with tags, starring, and capture button

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Terminal-style chat interface with command prompt input

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: Multi-panel settings with CRT controls, keybinds, account, and about
